view.title: Tiro VPS {id}
view.reinstallNote: Ka taea e koe te tāurunga anō mai i te tahua mauī
view.cpanelNote: Me tāura te pane whakahaere ki tētahi tāurunga OS hou kore hurihanga. Ki te whai raraunga ka ngaro.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te tono anō i te īmēra whakamihi?
view.emailSentMessage: Kua tukuna anō te īmēra whakamihi. Tirohia tō pouaka tomo.

order.title: Ota VPS
order.rootPasswordNote: Tāpiri: Me whai te kupuhipa ōrite ki te 8 pūāhua, tētahi pūāhua iti, tētahi pūāhua nui, tētahi tau, ā tētahi pūāhua motuhake.
order.subscriptionRenewal: Ka aunoa te whakahōu o te ohaurunga i muri i {period} mō te {cost} tae noa ki te whakakore.
order.tosAcknowledgment: Mā te tīnei i tēnei pouaka, ka whakaaetia e koe ko koe e hoko ana i tētahi hua ohaurunga e aunoa ana te whakahōu ā ka utua ki te kāri nama e tukua ana e koe i tēnei rā. Ki te hiahia koe ki te whakakore i tō whakahōu aunoa, ka taea e koe te uru ki te kaitiaki kiritaki kōwhiri ana i te ratonga hohe ā pāwhiri ana i te hononga Whakakore i te īmēra rānei ki: billing{'@'}interserver.net i tētahi tikanga atu rānei i whakaahuatia i ngā Tikanga me ngā Āhuatanga. Mā te tīnei i te pouaka ā pāwhiri ana i te Whakatū Tōku Ota i raro, ka whakaaetia hoki e koe kua pānuitia, mārama, ā whakaae ana ki ā mātou Tikanga me ngā Āhuatanga me te Kaupapahere Tūmataitanga.
order.tosAgree: Kua pānuitia e ahau ngā tikanga i runga ā whakaae ana ahau.

buyIp.title: Āpitihanga IP Tāpiri mō tō VPS

buyHdSpace.title: Wāhi Kōpae VPS Tāpiri
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Ka taea te hoko ōrite ki te 1 tae ake ki te 100GB wāhi HD tāpiri

changeRootPassword.title: Huri Kupuhipa Pūtake VPS
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Kāore te Kupuhipa me te Whakaū Kupuhipa e ōrite ana

changeTimezone.title: Huri Rohe Wā {module}
changeTimezone.importantNote1: Me whakamutua tō {module} katoa i mua i te huri i te rohe wā.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: Ka whakamutua ā tīmatahia anō te VPS i te wā o te mahinga.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: Ka huri tūāhuatia te rohe wā i tēnei whārangi ki America/New_York ahakoa he aha tō tūmau tautuhinga.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Huri Kupuhipa Kaiwhakahaere Webuzo
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Kāore te Kupuhipa me te Whakaū Kupuhipa e ōrite ana

reinstallOs.title: Tāurunga Anō OS
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Ka mukua ngā raraunga katoa mā te tāurunga anō o te pūnaha whakahaere.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: I mua i te tāurunga anō o te pūnaha whakahaere, tikiake ana i tētahi tiakinga.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: Ka hiahia ana ahau ki te tāurunga anō i te OS!

resetPassword.title: Tautuhi Anō Kupuhipa VPS
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Ko te tautuhi anō kupuhipa Windows ka puta he whakamutanga kore māmā. Whakaaro ana ko tēnei ko te ara whakamutunga. Whakamana i VNC kāore he whakahōunga e oma ana. Ki te oma ana tētahi whakahōunga ka whakaatu VNC: E hoatu ana a Windows ngā whakahōunga, kaua e whakamutu. Ka taea te puta he miihini kāore e taea ana ki te tīmata mā te whakamutua i tēnei āhua.
resetPassword.confirmReset: Ka hiahia ana ahau ki te Tautuhi Anō i te Kupuhipa!

reverseDns.title: DNS Huri
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Ka tae ake ki tētahi hāora ngā hurihanga ki te DNS huri ki te puta.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Ka taea anake i te Papahiko Windows. Ko te tūāpae mamao he ara tere ā ngāwari ki te hono ki te tūāpae o tētahi miihini mariko.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: Me tautuhia tuatahi te kupuhipa Kaiwhakahaere i runga i te VPS i mua i tō whakamahi i te tūāpae mamao.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Honoa mā VNC i HTML5 VNC rānei ki te tautuhia tō kupuhipa tuatahi.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: Mō tētahi akoranga tūāpae mamao pāwhiria
vnc.desktopVncDescription: Ka taea e VNC te hono ki te tūāpae o te miihini mariko. Ka taea e VNC te oma i roto i te pūtirotiro i tētahi kaihoko motuhake rānei. Me whakaae koe i tō wāhitau IP o tō rorohiko i mua i tō whakatūria o te hononga.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Tuku Uru VNC ki Tō IP
vnc.grantIpWait: Tāria 2 meneti mō te mahi ki te oti.
vnc.vncClientNote: Ka taea anō e koe te tikiake i tētahi o ngā kaihoko VNC maha kei runga i te ipurangi. E tūtohu ana mātou i TightVNC. Honoa mā tō wāhitau IP VPS. Kāore he kupuhipa e hiahiatia ana i muri i tō wāhitau IP mamao i whakaaetia i te tūānga 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: Ki te hono mā HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.connectOldLayout: Ki te hono mā te hoahoa tawhito:
vnc.html5Note: Kaihoko VNC HTML5 e oma pai ana i tētahi pūtirotiro hou tae atu ki ngā pūtirotiro pūkoro (iOS me Android).

setupVnc.title: Tautuhia VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: IP ki te tuku uru VNC

insertCd.insertIso: Tāpiri Āhua ISO ki Kōpae CDROM
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Tāuruhia he URL ISO CD, DVD rānei

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Ka mahi anake ngā tiakinga me te wāhanga taunoa.
backup.confirmBackup: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te tiaki?

restore.offlineNote: Ka kore tō tūmau e whai hononga i te wā e whakakapi ana i ō kōnae katoa o ināianei ki ērā kei runga i te tiakinga. Whakapā mai ki te tautoko me ōu pātai.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Tāuruhia Kupuhipa Takiuru ki te Whakamana Whakahoki.
restore.confirmRestore: He tūturu tāu e hiahia ana ki te whakahoki i tēnei tiakinga?

trafficUsage.title: Whakamahi Waipuke / Tikanga
trafficUsage.billingNote: Kāore tēnei i whakamahia mō ngā tatau utu ā he tātai anake i runga i ō kāri whatunga mariko.

slices.title: Whakaara / Whakaheke Ngā Wāhanga
slices.slicesNote: Tae ake ki te 32 Wāhanga ka taea te tāpiri ki tētahi VPS.
slices.recurringBillNote: Ka hurihia tēnei nui te pire hoki
slices.newInvoiceNote: Ka utu tēnei nui ngā pire hou
slices.confirmLabel: Āe ka hiahia ana ahau ki tēnei.
